questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "She said she had been ___"
questions.answer: waiting for over an hour.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "He told me he would call ___"
questions.answer: me the next day.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "They said they couldn't ___"
questions.answer: come to the party that night.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "She told us the meeting ___"
questions.answer: had already finished.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "He said he had never ___"
questions.answer: visited that city before.

questions.prompt: “I am really tired,” she said. → She said she _____ really tired.
questions.answer: was

questions.prompt: “I can speak French,” he told me. → He told me he _____ speak French.
questions.answer: could

questions.prompt: “We have finished the report,” they said. → They said they _____ the report.
questions.answer: had finished

questions.prompt: “I will help you tomorrow,” she told us. → She told us she _____ help us the next day.
questions.answer: would

questions.prompt: “We arrived late,” they said. → They said they _____ late.
questions.answer: had arrived

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She said me that she was tired."
questions.answer: 'Say' doesn't take a person object directly. Use 'told me' or just 'said': 'She told me she was tired.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "He told that the film was boring."
questions.answer: 'Tell' always needs a person object. Use 'said': 'He said the film was boring.' or add a person: 'He told us the film was boring.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "She said she will help me the next day."
questions.answer: 'Will' shifts to 'would' in reported speech: 'she would help me'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "They told me they have finished the report."
questions.answer: Present perfect shifts to past perfect in reported speech: 'they had finished'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "He said that he can come to the meeting."
questions.answer: 'Can' shifts to 'could' in reported speech: 'that he could come'
She said she was hungry.
He told me he would call the next day.
They said they had seen the film the day before.
She told me she couldn't come to the party.
The boss said they were working hard.
